title: 20 Preview vs 222
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] 2.0 Preview vs. 2.22             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 05, 2010 11:39 pm I'm going to let the comparisons speak for themselves. Also, click the thumbnails for a larger view.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sat Jun 05, 2010 11:47 pm Man that preview looked better than the real deal ;__;

[]:             Quote Post by arias » Sun Jun 06, 2010 12:00 am Amount of changes are astonishing. Many of those animation key frames had to be literally redrawn.. they're doing a LOT of work.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 06, 2010 12:04 am Relevant, which I'm guessing you've seen before: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6961 and http://www.evageeks.org/2009/07/evangelion-1-01-on-ntv-this-friday/ The 1.0 TV version preview is floating around online if you haven't seen it yet. It's so weird how they changed Shinji's "rape face" from 2.0 to 2.22 though (yes, in the camrip, Shinji had a similar expression from the 2.0 Preview). And yeah, there's a poster for 2.22 that shows just how many cuts were changed with 2.0 to 2.22...It almost looks like every other scene if not every scene had something fixed about it!

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Jun 06, 2010 12:06 am the mari scene is wrong, the actual movie scene is later, she stares at a bunch of birds flying away from the city before zeruel battle.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 06, 2010 12:19 am bladerj wrote: the mari scene is wrong, the actual movie scene is later, she stares at a bunch of birds flying away from the city before zeruel battle.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jun 06, 2010 1:12 am arias wrote: Amount of changes are astonishing. Many of those animation key frames had to be literally redrawn.. they're doing a LOT of work.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jun 06, 2010 1:41 am Just like I'm sure the entire teaser at the end of 3.0 is a mockup. Those shots of Kaworu and Asuka particularly look a bit below Rebuild's normal visual quality.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:53 am I prefer the old unit 06, by far...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jun 06, 2010 4:12 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Just like I'm sure the entire teaser at the end of 3.0 is a mockup. Those shots of Kaworu and Asuka particularly look a bit below Rebuild's normal visual quality.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Sun Jun 06, 2010 5:39 am I prefer the areal drop scene for Unit 02 in the preview. There are clouds on the sky! :)

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 6:58 am Jinroh wrote: I prefer the old unit 06, by far...

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Sun Jun 06, 2010 7:16 am Kaworu looks more like Kaworu in the preview. 2.0 preview Shinji rape-face reminds me of his expression in NGE though. And Unit-05's colour scheme looked better in the preview too. Mark VI looked so different that I thought they just didn't have the scene in the preview...I too prefer the way it looked in the preview.

[]:             Quote Post by IkariRei » Sun Jun 06, 2010 8:43 am The entire slap scene is missing? Did Misato slap Ritsuko in ep.20 in the TV series?

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Sun Jun 06, 2010 9:21 am IkariRei wrote: The entire slap scene is missing? Did Misato slap Ritsuko in ep.20 in the TV series?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Sun Jun 06, 2010 9:29 am IkariRei wrote: The entire slap scene is missing? Did Misato slap Ritsuko in ep.20 in the TV series?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 06, 2010 10:45 am Jinroh wrote: I prefer the old unit 06, by far...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 10:51 am Eva monkey wrote: Ditto. It looked so badass and menacing.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jun 06, 2010 1:25 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: and that the events with Leliel would be in the film.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 06, 2010 1:59 pm Legendary wrote: It is known that they didn't know what the deal with Mari was, so it's entirely possible she wrote Asuka out of the fight.
